title: Vertical Arrangement of Vintage-Inspired Hair Accessories on Neutral Background
description: A vertical display of various hair accessories featuring vintage-inspired designs including polka dots, floral prints, and crochet textures. The collection includes scrunchies, bow clips, and hairpins in soft, muted colors arranged neatly on a clean, neutral fabric background. The image highlights fabric textures and intricate crochet details with portrait lighting and sharp focus, suitable for product catalogues and promotional materials.
